channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Dietary habits linked to dementia risk in patients with Alzheimer's pathology
item.description: Greater adherence to a low-inflammatory diet was associated with lower dementia risk among those with Alzheimer's pathology.

item.title: COVID vaccine mandates not solely to blame for lower vaccination rates today
item.description: Childhood vaccination rates have declined globally, with increased hesitancy and populist political influence playing roles.

item.title: Australians missing out on gap between innovation and patient care
item.description: Promising health tools that predict serious health risks are rarely used in everyday care, leaving a major gap.

item.title: Vellore cohort reveals India's double burden of malnutrition in school-age children
item.description: Children in a low-income urban community in Vellore face both persistent undernutrition and rising overweight rates.
